hero.title: Interview Scheduler
hero.description: Organize interview appointments, rounds, calendar reminders, and completed interview history.

differences.title: Keep every interview stage connected
differences.description: Interview Scheduler provides a focused workflow for planning interviews, tracking rounds, and reviewing outcomes.

items.title: Schedule foundation
items.description: Capture candidate, role, company, stage, priority, and target date.

items.title: Round planning
items.description: Track each interview round with interviewer, type, timing, and preparation notes.

items.title: Calendar and history
items.description: Keep event reminders and completed interview outcomes attached to the schedule.

feel.title: A calm interview planning desk
feel.description: The workflow keeps interview context, upcoming events, and past outcomes in one place.

items.title: Create the schedule
items.description: Start with the candidate, role, stage, and target timeline.

items.title: Add rounds and events
items.description: Plan the next interview steps and calendar reminders.

items.title: Record outcomes
items.description: Capture completed interview notes and next steps.

audiences.title: Who uses Interview Scheduler
audiences.description: Useful for people and teams organizing interview appointments and outcomes.

items.title: Job seekers
items.description: Keep upcoming interviews and follow-ups organized.

items.title: Recruiters
items.description: Track candidate rounds and scheduling details.

items.title: Hiring teams
items.description: Review planned interview appointments and completed outcomes.

resourceSection.title: Interview scheduling essentials
resourceSection.description: Keep schedules, rounds, calendar events, and history connected.

items.title: Schedules
items.description: Store the candidate and role context.

groupedSection.title: Move from planning to follow-through
groupedSection.description: Use one protected workflow for interview scheduling and review.

groups.title: Stay ready for what comes next
